commands.review_summary:
This PR expands `extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.test.ts` with jsdom tests for diff viewer hydration payloads, shadow-root adoption, highlighter preloading, and toolbar state synchronization.

PR surface: Tests +146. Total +146 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a behavior reproduction; this is a test coverage PR. Source inspection confirms current `viewer-client.ts` owns the hydration and toolbar paths that the PR's new tests target.

target.title: test(diffs): cover viewer client controls
target.body:
Fixes #83915

## Summary
- keep the existing viewer-client icon safety and hydration error-path coverage
- add jsdom coverage for hydrating real diff card payloads, including declarative shadow root adoption and highlighter preloading
- cover toolbar layout and wrap actions synchronizing all hydrated FileDiff controllers

## Proof
- `CI=true node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.extension-diffs.config.ts extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.test.ts --reporter=dot --testTimeout=10000`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json extensions/diffs/src/viewer-client.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
target.author: alix-007
